action.reasoning: Observation: Trained 3 more seeds (6,7,8) with same config as 0,1,2 (window 530:620, 5 epochs, LR 1e-4). Val_spearmans 0.893, 0.893, 0.893. Now I have 6 'consistent' seeds (0,1,2 in ensemble/, 6,7,8 in ensemble2/) plus 3 'diverse' seeds (3,4,5 in ensemble/) which seemed to hurt. Best so far: 3-seed ensemble (seeds 0,1,2) gave 0.8584. Decision: Build a clean ensemble dir with just the 6 consistent seeds (0,1,2,6,7,8), submit eval. This should improve over both 3-seed (0.8584) and the noisy 6-seed (0.855) attempts.
